free_text: The (O-18,O-16) reaction on even tin isotopes.
MP tandem Van de Graaff facilities.
The targets were prepared by evaporating 80 mug/cm**2
of tin metal on a thin carbon backing. The isotopic
enrichment of the different target materials is for
*By authors*.The relative normalization of the seven
counters was done using Rutherford scattering on a thin
gold target. The absolute cross section was determined
by normalizing the O-18 elastic scattering to the
Rutherford cross section at small angles.
Besides the statistical error, the absolute cross
sections are accurate within 30%. The elastic peak
always contains counting rates from transfer channls,
but from the time-of-flight spectra was estimated that
these contributions are less than 20% even at large
